home.welcome: Welcome to the Set Up Panel for the Cookiebot!
home.groupBotCount: I am Currently active in XXX Groups!
home.inviteMeText: If you wish to add it to a group, select “Add Me” Or if you wish to configure any settings, go ahead and select the setting to be configured! Any doubts or feedback, please contact @MekhyW
moderation.captcha.title: Captcha Resolution Time
moderation.captcha.description: Set the time in seconds to solve the security captcha
moderation.sticker.title: Sticker Spam Limiter
moderation.sticker.description: Configures the number of stickers in sequence to activate the warning
moderation.imagetimeout.title: Image Timeout
moderation.imagetimeout.description: Set in minutes the timeout for images to be sent to the group after joining
moderation.allowexternalmedia.title: Allow External Media (Videos or Documents)
